title: Hard-sound gun
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''hard-sound gun''' was a [[Sonic weapon/Legends|sonic weapon]] that used "hard" sound to injure, disorientate, and incapacitate opponents.

Finding a wide usage as an anti-[[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] weapon, hard sound guns produced an incredibly loud sonic shriek designed to overload the auditory nerves, causing immense pain and disorientation on the target. Consisting of small hand-held antenna, the hard-sound gun was a weapon that produced a focused and directional cone of hard sonic energy, capable of bursting eardrums, and even knocking over [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]]. So powerful was this sound, it was capable of causing pain even after an ear had been burst, and was described as having an iron bar smack you in the face.<ref name="Yoda">''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''</ref>

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], hard-sound guns were deployed by the [[A-series assassin droid]]s carried by [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] against [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jai Maruk]] and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Maks Leem]] to great effect. The sound was so powerful and debilitating as to make Leem, a Jedi master, drop her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. While both Jedi were momentarily incapacitated, eventually, several minutes later they were able to overcome their pain and destroy the devices, and the droids.<ref name="Yoda" />

Decades later, in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] at the start of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], at least one pair of [[Sonic generator droid]]s were modified to carry similar sonic weapons to defend [[Centerpoint Station]] against Jedi saboteurs. These did not burst [[Human/Legends|Human]] eardrums, and were designed more for incapacitation; effective against any kind of opponent, they were capable of bringing down a Jedi alive and relatively unharmed.<ref name="betrayal">''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''</ref>

{{Weapon-stub}}
